summary: Read-only plan: #83368 remains the canonical implementation path for preserving raw external session aliases. #86743 is the matching open issue but should remain open/related until the canonical fix is merge-ready. #86826 overlaps the same fix path and is superseded by #83368, with a planned closeout comment preserving contributor credit.
